━━┤┤ Exactly one (mandatory)
━━○┤ Zero or one (optional)
━━┤< One or many
━━○< Zero or many
▢ Single border = Strong Entity
▢▢ Double border = Weak Entity
attr = Partial Identifier (PK=FK)
- - - Dashed line = Nullable FK
━━━ Thick line = Identifying Rel.
